decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle using low-cost spells and creatures. By combining UR (Blue/Red) colors, the deck focuses on quickly building board presence and controlling the battlefield with cards like Burst Lightning, Elusive Otter, and Slickshot Show-Off. The deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain tempo throughout the game by utilizing instant spells, efficient creatures, and card draw effects. Key components include spell synergy, evasion abilities, and versatile removal options to outpace the opponent and secure victory.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to play powerful creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. It also utilizes unique cards like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Ba Sing Se for additional value and versatility. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a mix of strong creatures and efficient mana ramp, while also utilizing cards like Escape Tunnel and Hushwood Verge for additional land acceleration and fixing. The deck's strategy is to quickly build a board presence and put pressure on opponents before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive black creatures and utilizing cards like Strategic Betrayal and Gatekeeper of Malakir to maintain board control. The deck aims to apply early pressure with low-cost creatures like Forsaken Miner and Faerie Dreamthief, while also utilizing powerful equipment like Dark Knight's Greatsword to deal damage efficiently. The inclusion of Thought-Stalker Warlock and Shoot the Sheriff provides added utility and disruption, allowing the deck to maintain its aggressive tempo and close out games before the opponent can recover.

This deck focuses on combining powerful creatures with reanimation spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Restless Reef and Gloomlake Verge to provide additional resources, the player can quickly bring out high-impact threats like Harvester of Misery and Overlord of the Balemurk. Cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Winternight Stories can also disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up the combo. Deadly Cover-Up and Shoot the Sheriff provide additional removal options, while cards like Deceit and Emeritus of Ideation help filter the player's draws for key pieces of the combo.

The main goal of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. By playing cheap creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, along with efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, the deck aims to apply early pressure and control the board. The deck also includes some bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Get Out to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the deck focuses on maintaining momentum and keeping the opponent on the back foot to secure a swift victory.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence with creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Badgermole Cub. The deck utilizes ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to quickly play powerful creatures and overwhelm the opponent. Ba Sing Se provides a way to protect your creatures, while Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer give additional buffs to your creatures. Escape Tunnel enables surprise attacks, and Snakeskin Veil and Royal Treatment provide additional protection for your key creatures. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain board dominance.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and efficient spells. By utilizing cards like Erode, Mightform Harmonizer, and Sazh's Chocobo, the deck focuses on building a strong board presence early on and maintaining pressure throughout the game. With a mix of aggressive creatures and support spells such as Earthbender Ascension and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam, the deck aims to close out games quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and low-cost spells. By generating a wide board presence early on with cards like Pawpatch Recruit and Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and force the opponent to react defensively. Brightglass Gearhulk and Gene Pollinator provide additional power and resilience, while Meltstrider's Resolve and Seam Rip offer disruption and removal options. Overall, the strategy revolves around establishing a strong board presence and maintaining pressure to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to control the tempo of the game by using a combination of bounce spells, card draw, and removal. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments and Boomerang Basics to disrupt your opponent's strategy, while also drawing cards with Accumulate Wisdom and Firebending Lesson, you can maintain control of the battlefield. Combustion Technique and Gran-Gran provide powerful threats, while Iroh's Demonstration and Ral, Crackling Wit offer additional card advantage and flexibility. With a focus on managing resources and disrupting your opponent's plans, this deck aims to outmaneuver and outlast your opponent.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Callous Sell-Sword and Emberheart Challenger to quickly deal damage to your opponent. Cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Secret Identity allow for added versatility and disruption. Turn Inside Out and Traumatic Critique can help control the board while maintaining pressure. The deck's mana base is optimized with Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal to ensure smooth mana production. Leyline of Resonance and Stormchaser's Talent provide additional support for your creatures. Overall, the strategy is to overwhelm your opponent with a fast-paced, creature-based assault.

The main idea of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly build up a strong board presence with efficient creatures like Sage of the Skies, Badgermole Cub, and Pawpatch Recruit, supported by mana ramp from Llanowar Elves and Nurturing Pixie. With cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Gene Pollinator to give evasion and pump creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures and efficient combat tricks. The inclusion of cards like Hushwood Verge and Brightglass Gearhulk provide additional value and protection, making it a well-rounded and powerful aggro deck.

This deck focuses on aggressively attacking opponents with a mix of creatures and spells. It utilizes cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Shock to deal damage early on, while creatures like Emberheart Challenger and Hired Claw apply pressure. Multiversal Passage and Riverpyre Verge help fix mana, allowing for consistent plays. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Nova Hellkite and Stormchaser's Talent to secure the win. By combining fast creatures with burn spells and finishers, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient instant and sorcery spells. By utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics and Burst Lightning, you can control the board while dealing damage to your opponent. Riverpyre Verge and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional aggression, while Opt and Sleight of Hand help you draw into the cards you need. With a mix of evasion and removal, this UR Aggro deck aims to put pressure on your opponent early and maintain that pressure throughout the game.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using cards like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo to cast powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Mossborn Hydra. Utilizing Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to buff creatures and overwhelm opponents quickly. The deck also includes cards like Erode and Escape Tunnel for removal and protection. By combining aggressive creatures with mana ramp and buffs, this deck aims to establish board dominance early and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The main idea of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck focuses on efficiently dealing damage to your opponent while also controlling the board with cards like Channeled Dragonfire and Hexing Squelcher. By combining fast creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Emberheart Challenger with powerful spells like Burst Lightning and Broadside Barrage, this deck aims to apply pressure early and close out games swiftly. With a strong mana base and versatile card options, this deck can adapt to various matchups and strategies.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent quickly by playing efficient creatures and using spells to boost their power. The deck focuses on playing low-cost creatures like Pawpatch Recruit and Llanowar Elves to put pressure on your opponent early in the game. The aim is to build a strong board presence and finish off your opponent with powerful cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Ouroboroid. The deck also includes some utility cards like Seam Rip and Gene Pollinator to disrupt your opponent's strategy and protect your own creatures.
